peacekeepers.playstyle: disciplined combined-arms defense and secure expansion
peacekeepers.economy: Survey Drones harvest Credits and Lunar Alloy, then return cargo to the Command Nexus.
peacekeepers.supply: Communications Relays add 10 Command Capacity after construction.
peacekeepers.tech: Tactical Armory unlocks Riot Vanguards; Security Turrets defend expansions.

syndicate.playstyle: mobility, raiding, stealth, and resource disruption
syndicate.current_prototype_role: The Syndicate Hideout sends escalating Runner and Bruiser waves.
syndicate.future_economy: Mobile Siphon teams steal Credits from exposed resource sites rather than relying on fixed depots.

nullborn.playstyle: territorial corruption, attrition, and mass-produced biological pressure
nullborn.future_economy: Biomass Vents consume resource nodes and spread Corrupted Ground that enables Nullborn construction.
